extensionDescription.message: Automatically detects, anonymizes, or masks personally identifiable information (PII) before pasting into AI chatbots. Supports reversible Gemini Nano mode and local Privacy Filter simple mode.

modeHintReversible.message: Reversible replaces PII with fake data when pasting and restores known values from local tab mappings when copying.

modeHintSimple.message: Simple masks detected PII with typed placeholders and does not perform reverse de-anonymization.

modeSummaryReversible.message: When pasting, detected PII is replaced with plausible fake data. When copying from the chat, local tab mappings are used to restore original values.

modeSummarySimple.message: When pasting, detected PII is masked locally with typed placeholders such as <PRIVATE_EMAIL> or <PRIVATE_PERSON>. Copying does not restore originals.

promptApiUnavailable.message: Prompt API is not available in this context

simpleInitialDetail.message: Local in the browser, without external services.

simpleLoadTitle.message: Download and initialize the Privacy Filter model locally

simplePermissionMissingDetail.message: Enable Simple Mode again and confirm the model download from Hugging Face.

simplePreparingWebGPU.message: The offscreen runtime is preparing Privacy Filter over WebGPU.

simpleReadyDetail.message: Privacy Filter is running locally in the browser over WebGPU.

cachedDetail.message: The model is stored locally and only needs to be initialized.

readyToDownloadDetail.message: On first Simple Mode start, the model is downloaded once from Hugging Face.

warningStrong.message: Local protection, not a free pass.

warningText.message: PII Shield reduces risk, but it does not replace manual review for sensitive or regulated data.

clearTabTitle.message: Clear replacements for this tab only

mappingsEmpty.message: No active replacements for this tab.

mappingsSimpleHint.message: Simple Mode has no reverse mapping and no tab-local fake/original mappings.

simpleStep1.message: The first switch to Simple Mode asks PII Shield for Hugging Face download permission.

simpleStep2.message: The q4 Privacy Filter model is downloaded and stored in the extension's browser cache.

simpleStep3.message: After download, analysis runs locally over WebGPU; your texts are not sent to Hugging Face.

clearAllConfirm.message:
Permanently clear all mappings for all tabs?

After clearing, copied answers can no longer be restored automatically to the original data.

errorAiApiMissing.message: The Chrome Prompt API is not available in this extension context.

errorAiStatusFailed.message: The Gemini Nano status could not be checked.

errorAiSessionFailed.message: Gemini Nano could not be started or downloaded.

errorParseFailed.message: The AI response could not be parsed.

manualSimpleModelMissing.message: The Privacy Filter model has not been downloaded yet. Start Simple Mode in the popup and wait until the local download is complete.

manualSimplePermissionMissing.message: Simple Mode needs one-time download permission for the Privacy Filter model. Enable Simple Mode in the popup and confirm the permission.

manualSimpleDownloading.message: The Privacy Filter model is currently downloading or initializing. Wait until Simple Mode is shown as ready.

manualSimpleDownloadFailed.message: The Privacy Filter model could not be downloaded. Check the connection and try again in the popup.

manualSimpleQuotaExceeded.message: Chrome could not store the Privacy Filter model locally. Check available disk space and download the model again.

manualWebGPUUnavailable.message: WebGPU is not available in this browser profile. Simple Mode cannot mask the text locally.

manualOffscreenUnavailable.message: The local model runtime could not be started.

manualSimpleInitFailed.message: The local Privacy Filter model could not be loaded.

manualSimpleAnalysisFailed.message: Simple Mode could not check the text locally right now.

manualSimpleUnavailable.message: The local Privacy Filter model is not ready right now.

manualSimpleDefault.message: Simple Mode could not mask the text locally right now.

badgeInactive.message: PII Shield inactive - click to activate

badgeActiveSimple.message: PII Shield active (Simple Mode) - click to deactivate

badgeActiveReversible.message: PII Shield active (Reversible Mode) - click to deactivate

bannerHintAnonymized.message: Anonymized locally - reverse mapping stays only in this tab.

bannerHintMasked.message: Masked locally - Simple Mode has no reverse mapping.

pasteQueuedDetail.message: The current text is being checked locally. $COUNT$ additional paste operation is already waiting.

pasteQueuedDetailPlural.message: The current text is being checked locally. $COUNT$ additional paste operations are already waiting.

pasteRunningDetail.message: The text is being checked locally and will be inserted automatically afterward.

pasteStatusTitle.message: PII Shield is checking the paste...

manualDialogTitle.message: PII Shield could not mask locally

notifyOriginalInserted.message: Original text was inserted unmasked at explicit request.

notifyNoServiceWorkerResponse.message: Paste blocked: no response from the service worker.

notifyServiceWorkerUnreachable.message: Paste blocked: service worker is unreachable.

notifyDeanonymized.message: Anonymized data in the answer was restored.
